channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: Police Scotland Fined After Sharing Victim’s Phone Data
item.description: Police Scotland has been fined £66,000 and reprimanded after a serious data protection failure when it shared the entire contents of a female officer’s phone with a colleague she accused of rape. The incident, which spanned several months in early 2021, stems from an internal officer misconduct investigation. An Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO) penalty notice redacted many of the details, but the victim in question subsequently waived her right to anonymity in a BBC report.

item.title: Major Data Breach at Healthcare Tech Firm Impacts 3,433,965 People – Names, Social Security Numbers and Insurance Info Potentially Exposed
item.description: A major data breach at a US healthcare technology firm has impacted 3,433,965 individuals. According to a breach notification filing, the incident at TriZetto Provider Solutions was the result of an external system breach involving unauthorized access to company systems. TriZetto Provider Solutions is based in Missouri and provides claims processing and revenue management services to healthcare providers.
